headline: How The Investment Story For Brixmor Property Group (BRX) Is Shifting With New Street Targets
summary: Price targets for Brixmor Property Group have been clustering in the low to mid US$30s, framing how analysts are thinking about upside from the current fair value anchor of US$32.21. These moves are tied to updated models that factor in strip center fundamentals, Brixmor’s redevelopment pipeline, and revised FFO estimates across 2026 and 2027. As you read on, you will see what is driving these calls and how to track the next shifts in the story. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the...

headline: How The AdvanSix (ASIX) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Assumptions And Risks
summary: The latest update for AdvanSix lifts the fair value estimate from US$22.50 to US$23.50, a modest reset that frames where some analysts currently see the share price potential. That change sits alongside research describing a mixed setup, with cost and capital discipline on one side, and input cost and EBITDA pressures on the other. Read on to see how these moving parts fit together and how you can keep track of the evolving AdvanSix story. Stay updated as the Fair Value for AdvanSix shifts by...
